ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-13-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) AND (D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 1/23/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 1/13/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT; ADDITIONAL 5 DAYS IF SERVICE BY MAIL, ADDITIONAL 2 DAYS IF BY FAX. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT 40 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: BOB BALIAN, CSR #5220
